# Q 

2 

M 

LEATHERSET STRONG

## Interior / maintenance

### Complete leather maintenance set for used and dirty leather.

Q²M LeatherSet Strong offers a comprehensive solution for cleaning and protecting heavily used or dirty automotive leather. It combines Q²M LeatherCleaner Strong with Q² LeatherCoat REDEFINED, enabling deep cleaning and long-lasting protection in a single step, aided by all the necessary accessories included.

![image](https://gyeon.co/wp-content/uploads/2018/10/productmain_1700x1645px_q2m_leather-cleaner-strong_box_2023-1024x991.png)

[Technical Details](#technical-details)

## Complete leather maintenance set for used and dirty leather.

Q²M LeatherSet Strong restores heavily soiled leather by pairing intensive cleaning with long lasting protection. It prepares the surface correctly, removes dirt and oily residue, and applies a protective layer that simplifies future maintenance.

![image](https://gyeon.co/wp-content/uploads/2025/12/benefiticons54.svg)

QUICK AND EFFECTIVE 

![image](https://gyeon.co/wp-content/uploads/2025/12/benefiticons15.svg)

REMOVES DIRT AND STAINS 

![image](https://gyeon.co/wp-content/uploads/2025/12/benefiticons73.svg)

STRONG CLEANING ACTION 

## TECHNICAL DETAILS

![image](https://gyeon.co/wp-content/uploads/2025/12/860x640q2mleathersetstrong.webp)

BOX CONTAINS 

Q²M LeatherCleaner Strong 200ml / Q² LeatherCoat 120ml / Q²M ScrubPad EVO / Q²M MF Applicator / microfibre 

Consumption

1set / 2-3 cars

## HOW TO USE

Q 

2 

M 

LEATHERSET STRONG

01
Clean the leather using Q²M LeatherCleaner Strong and the included tools. 

02
Remove loosened contamination with a microfibre towel. 

03
Apply Q² LeatherCoat REDEFINED evenly to the leather. 

04
Allow the product to bond to the surface. 

05
Let the leather dry before use. 

### Watch
product
video

## FREQUENTLY ASKED
QUESTIONS

01
What is included in Q²M LeatherSet Strong? 

LeatherCleaner Strong, LeatherCoat REDEFINED and application accessories.

02
When should this set be used? 

For heavily used or dirty leather upholstery.

03
Does it leave the leather shiny? 

No. It leaves a natural, matte finish.

04
How many cars can one set treat? 

Around two to three vehicles.

05
Is it suitable for modern automotive leather? 

Yes. It is designed for modern leather upholstery.

[FIND MORE ANSWERS](https://gyeon.zendesk.com/hc/en-us/sections/360000254658-Q-M-Leather-Set-Strong)

## Recommended Pairing

We recommend complementary products that perfectly match your current one, creating a complete and convenient KIT. Together, they deliver the best performance and a seamless user experience.
